en.contact_title: Let's Build Something Great Together
en.contact_subtitle: Have a project in mind? We'd love to hear about it. Drop us a message and we'll get back to you shortly.
en.contact_hero_desc: Ready to start your next project? Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
en.contact_info_desc: Prefer to reach out directly? You can find our contact details below.

id.contact_title: Mari Bangun Sesuatu Yang Hebat Bersama
id.contact_subtitle: Punya ide seru buat proyek selanjutnya? Yuk, ngobrol bareng! Tinggalin pesan di bawah, nanti kami bakal sapa Anda secepatnya.
id.contact_hero_desc: Udah siap buat mulai proyek barumu? Isi aja form di bawah ini, tim kami bakal merespon dalam 1x24 jam.
id.contact_info_desc: Lebih suka kontak langsung? Tenang, kamu bisa pakai jalur di bawah ini.
